data.title: SLB Non-GAAP EPS of $0.55 beats by $0.03, revenue of $8.97B beats by $290M
data.description:
• SLB press release (SLB): Q2 Non-GAAP EPS of $0.55 beats by $0.03.
  • Revenue of $8.97B (+4.9% Y/Y) beats by $290M.
  • Adjusted EBITDA of $1.90 billion increased 7% sequentially and decreased 7% year on year

data.title: Flagstar Bank sets $250M stock repurchase program
data.description:
• Flagstar Bank (NYSE: FLG) has set a stock repurchase program for up to $250M of its outstanding common stock over the next 12-month period.
  • Repurchases may be conducted through open-market purchases, which may include purchases under a trading plan adopted pursuant to Securities and Exchange Commission Rule 10b5-1, or through privately negotiated transactions.

data.title: Bank of America raises dividend by 14% to $0.32/share
data.description:
• Bank of America (BAC) declares $0.32/share quarterly dividend, 14.3% increase from prior dividend of $0.28.
  • Forward yield 2.09%
  • Payable Sept. 25; for shareholders of record Sept. 4; ex-div Sept. 4.
  • The company also continues to repurchase common stock under a $40B authorization from the board, which has been in effect since August 1, 2025.
  • In the first half of 2026, the company repurchased $13.2B of common stock and paid $4B in dividends.
  • As of June 30, 2026, the current share repurchase program had approximately $17B in common stock repurchases remaining.
  • See BAC Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Booz Allen Non-GAAP EPS of $1.81 beats by $0.33, revenue of $2.8B misses by $10M
data.description:
• Booz Allen press release (BAH): Q1 Non-GAAP EPS of $1.81 beats by $0.33.
  • Revenue of $2.8B (-4.2% Y/Y)  misses by $10M.
  • Revenue ex-billables of $2.0 billion, a 3.8 percent decrease
  •  Free cash flow of $261 million, compared to $96 million in the prior year.
  • 1.5x quarterly book-to-bill ratio
  • Total backlog of $39 billion, a 3.2 percent increase
  • OPERATING PERFORMANCE FISCAL YEAR 2027 GUIDANCERevenue $11.2 - $11.7 billionRevenue Growth 0 - 4.0%Adjusted EBITDA $1,240 - $1,290 millionAdjusted EBITDA Margin on Revenue ~11%Adjusted Diluted EPS $6.00 - $6.35 vs $6.26 consensusFree Cash Flow4 $825 - $925 million

data.title: FIBRA Prologis reports Q2 results
data.description:
• FIBRA Prologis (FBBPF): Q2 EPS: $(0.0285)
  • Revenue: $176.96M, +10.8% Y/Y

data.title: Gorman-Rupp declares $0.19 dividend
data.description:
• Gorman-Rupp (GRC) declares $0.19/share quarterly dividend, in line with previous.
  • Forward yield 0.95%
  • Payable Sept. 10; for shareholders of record Aug. 14; ex-div Aug. 14.
  • See GRC Dividend Scorecard, Yield Chart, & Dividend Growth.

data.title: Gorman-Rupp names Ronald Stoops as CFO
data.description:
• Gorman-Rupp Company (GRC) said executive vice president and chief financial officer James Kerr will step down as CFO on October 1, 2026, with vice president of finance Ronald Stoops set to succeed him.
  • Kerr will support the leadership transition and continue serving as a senior advisor to the company until his retirement at a later date.
  • Stoops joined Gorman-Rupp in 2020 and has held a number of financial roles.

data.title: Poste Italiane S.p.A. reports 1H results
data.description:
• Poste Italiane S.p.A. press release (PITAF): 1H Net profit: €1.2B, +4% Y/Y
  • Revenue: €6.8B, +6% Y/Y
  • Adjusted EBIT: €1.8B, +7% Y/Y
  • Investment inflows: €2.7B

data.title: Metso Oyj reports H1 results
data.description:
• Metso Oyj press release (OUKPF): H1 Sales: €2,587M, +5% Y/Y
  • Orders received: €3,017M, +12% Y/Y
  • Adjusted EBITA: €424M, +13% Y/Y
  • Adjusted EBITA margin: 16.4% (vs. 15.2%)
  • Operating profit: €351M, +1% Y/Y

data.title: Neste Oyj reports H1 results
